info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: SaNkate Saki SaNkAyAM SaktO Saknoti marzaRe ' (Slo. 43) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kruDyantIM mAM ca samprekzya samaSaNkata mAM tvayi' (BA0 vi0 1912)
'ahaM KalvAryasya prasAdAd devAnAmapi rAjyamASaNke kiM punarvAnarARAm' (aBizeka0 1) ASaNke prAptimutprekze

sTaRqilaSAyI ca SaNke jIvati vA na vA
